name: mattpocock/sandcastle
summary: Sandbox runtime for Codex and other coding agents across Docker, Podman, and Vercel, supporting isolated execution, reusable environments, worktree branch strategies, and sequential-reviewer or parallel-planner workflow templates.
evidence: README frames Sandcastle around running AFK coding agents in isolated sandboxes, managing branch strategy, and merging commits back.
The Codex provider runs `codex exec --json`, parses Codex stream events, and is included in the init-time agent registry with a Codex Dockerfile template.
Templates implement simple-loop, sequential-reviewer, parallel-planner, and parallel-planner-with-review workflows using explicit branches and sandbox lifecycle handling.
Sandbox lifecycle code handles git identity propagation, hooks, timeouts, commit collection, host sync for isolated providers, dirty worktree preservation, and cleanup.
